target_outcome: Discover traceable skill-audit capabilities, adjacent review surfaces, and raw signals for agent skills or method packages that a first-pass audit-skill search would likely miss.
lane_description: Skill and package-method audit discovery lane. Source-code-only security audit, domain audit skills, marketplace ranking, install, and adoption decisions are adjacent lanes and should not be mixed into this pool.
why_now: Agent skill packages, SKILL.md linters, npm-distributed skill scanners, and adjacent agent security tools are appearing quickly in 2026, so discovery needs traceable candidates before any adoption or package-quality gate.

does: discovers multiple traceable skill-audit and adjacent package-review candidates
records GitHub, npm, download, freshness, and source-gap raw signals
keeps exact skill-quality candidates separate from adjacent security scanners
records deferred boundaries for later adoption-stage review
does_not: does not recommend, approve, install, enable, configure, publish, deploy, login, execute, or mutate runtime config for any candidate
does not perform source, safety, permission, maintenance, credential, browser, provider, live, or external-write audit
does not choose a single winner

source_gaps: No public Codex/Claude/OpenClaw skill marketplace install-count API was used in this bounded run.
GitHub API does not expose true 7/30/90-day star velocity in the queried metadata; recent growth proxy uses created/updated/pushed dates plus current stars/forks.
npm search/download signals were sampled, not exhaustive across every package spelling.
PyPI, Homebrew, VS Code/Cursor extension stores, and private agent-skill registries were not exhaustively searched in this bounded run.
No candidate was installed or executed, so CLI behavior, output shape, and actual review coverage remain unverified.
Full JSON Schema validation is separate from this red-line artifact check.

false_positives.name: AgriciDaniel/claude-ads
false_positives.why_false_positive: High-star Claude skill with audit language, but it audits advertising accounts and campaigns, not candidate skills.
false_positives.query_correction: Require candidate object terms such as SKILL.md, agent skill, skill package, capability adoption, scanner, linter, or quality gate.

false_positives.name: aaron-he-zhu/seo-geo-claude-skills
false_positives.why_false_positive: Contains technical audit skills, but the audited object is SEO/GEO content and sites, not skills or agent capability packages.
false_positives.query_correction: Exclude domain audit collections unless they inspect agent skills or SKILL.md packages.

candidates.name: moonrunnerkc/skillcheck
candidates.target_outcome: Cross-agent quality gate for SKILL.md files with frontmatter, discoverability, file reference, token budget, and compatibility checks.

recent_growth_proxy.summary: Exact outcome match with recent push, but weak distribution signal.

find_signals: Description explicitly targets SKILL.md quality gates.
Mentions Claude Code, VS Code/Copilot, Codex, and Cursor compatibility.
Includes progressive disclosure and token-budget language aligned with skill-audit concerns.
notes: Exact GitHub hit in this bounded run.
Find-stage records the candidate and raw review-surface signals only.

candidates.name: joeynyc/skillscore

source.source_family: GitHub repository search and npm package registry

candidates.target_outcome: Evaluate AI agent skills and produce quality scores for SKILL.md-based skills from skills.sh, ClawHub, GitHub, or local directories.

download_signals.note: Last-month package downloads; not equivalent to active users.

recent_growth_proxy.summary: Outcome-adjacent skill scoring signal with package distribution and small download signal.

find_signals: Explicitly evaluates AI agent skills and produces quality scores.
Npm package exists with measurable downloads.
notes: Retained because it has both GitHub and npm raw signals.
Find-stage does not treat scoring claims as an approval verdict.

candidates.name: NVIDIA/SkillSpector
candidates.target_outcome: Security scanner for AI agent skills that detects vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks.

recent_growth_proxy.summary: Large high-growth-looking security scanner signal with direct AI agent skill object.

find_signals: High stars/forks relative to exact quality tools.
candidates.false_positive_note: Adjacent: security scanner, not quality/effectiveness evaluator.
notes: Recorded as an adjacent risk-surface candidate for later boundary review.
Not treated as a replacement for exact skill-quality review candidates.
